title: Optimize it please!
description: Get yourself a quick & easy performance boost!
body:
New release every Sunday!

## ❓About **Optimize it please!** is a client-side modpack for those who want pure uncompromising performances without any quality-of-life mods. It tries to improve as many aspects of the game as possible to achieve the highest level of performance on the latest version. *** ## ➕ Features If you want to check out which mods are included in the modpack, you can also go to Versions and select any version, then scroll down to see the Dependencies (mods) used in this particular version. Alternatively, you can see them in the list below.
List of used mods ⯇

• Chunky (by pop4959) • Cloth Config v9 (by shedaniel) • Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (by RelativityMC, ishland) • Debugify (by isXander) • Dynamic FPS (by juliand665) • EntityCulling (by tr7zw) • Exordium (by tr7zw) • Fabric API (by FabricMC) • Fast Load (FluffyBumblebees) • FastQuit (by KingContaria) • FerriteCore (by malte0811) • Hold That Chunk (by dlee13) • ImmediatelyFast (by RK_01) • Indium (by comp500) • Iris (by coderbot) • Krypton (by tuxed) • Language Reload (by Jerozgen) • LazyDFU (by tuxed) • Lithium (by JellySquid) • Memory Leak Fix (by FX) • MidnightLib (by Motschen) • Mod Menu (by Prospector) • More Culling (by FX) • More Culling Extra (by FX) • No Fade (by UltimateBoomer) • Purpur Client (by BillyGalbreath) • Puzzle (by PuzzleMC, Motschen) • Reese's Sodium Options (by FlashyReese) • Smooth Boot (by UltimateBoomer, fantahund) • Sodium (by JellySquid) • Sodium Extra (by FlashyReese) • Starlight (Spottedleaf) • Very Many Players (by ishland)
